response:
* The title accurately reflects the main focus of the abstract.  
* The abstract discusses the relationship between astrocytic coverage and glutamate clearance.  
* Glutamate clearance is linked to the degree of astrocytic coverage of neurons.  
* The study reveals that reduced glutamate clearance affects transmitter release.  
* This effect is mediated through presynaptic metabotropic glutamate receptors.  
* Astrocytic wrapping plays a role in regulating synaptic efficacy.  
* The title highlights the control of glutamate clearance by glial coverage.  
* The abstract supports the idea that glial coverage influences synaptic efficacy.  
* *highlighted section* The title is appropriate for the article's content.
